name: Brex
tagline: AI-powered spend platform with corporate cards, expense management, and bill pay
description:
Brex is a comprehensive spend management platform that consolidates corporate cards, expense tracking, bill payments, and travel booking into a single system. It is designed for startups and growing businesses seeking to automate and control their finances efficiently. The platform uses an AI engine to instantly categorize transactions, flag potential policy violations, and provide real-time visibility into company-wide spending.

Key features include Brex Empower, which allows finance teams to set granular spending controls and automated compliance rules for different departments or employees. Its integrated bill pay system syncs directly with your card and accounting software, eliminating manual data entry. A standout benefit is the unification of all spend workflows, which saves significant administrative time and offers a clear, auditable trail of all company expenditures.

A practical use case is a rapidly scaling tech company. As new hires join, admins can issue virtual cards with pre-set limits for specific budgets like software subscriptions or team lunches. All transactions are automatically categorized and reconciled, while managers gain a real-time dashboard to monitor burn rates without chasing receipts or manual reports. The freemium model makes it accessible for businesses to start with core card and expense features.
